queries.question: List all the amusement parks, also list the water parks but only those in Orlando, Florida.
queries.sql:
SELECT ThemeParks.parkName 
FROM ThemeParks WHERE ThemeParks.familyEntertainment = "Amusement Park"
UNION
SELECT ThemeParks.parkName 
FROM ThemeParks JOIN Locations ON ThemeParks.locationId = Locations.id
WHERE ThemeParks.familyEntertainment = "Water Park" AND Locations.name = "Orlando, Florida"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?themeparks a :ThemeParks .
    ?themeparks p:parkName ?parkname .
    ?themeparks p:familyEntertainment ?familyentertainment_f .
    FILTER(STR(?familyentertainment_f) = "Amusement Park")
    BIND(?parkname AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?themeparks a :ThemeParks .
    ?locations a :Location .
    ?themeparks p:hasLocations ?locations .
    ?themeparks p:parkName ?parkname .
    ?themeparks p:familyEntertainment ?familyentertainment_f .
    ?locations p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?familyentertainment_f) = "Water Park")
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Orlando, Florida")
    BIND(?parkname AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: What are the amusement parks in Orlando, Florida? What are the water parks in the same place?
queries.sql:
SELECT ThemeParks.parkName 
FROM ThemeParks JOIN Locations ON ThemeParks.locationId = Locations.id
WHERE ThemeParks.familyEntertainment = "Amusement Park" AND Locations.name = "Orlando, Florida"
UNION
SELECT ThemeParks.parkName 
FROM ThemeParks JOIN Locations ON ThemeParks.locationId = Locations.id
WHERE ThemeParks.familyEntertainment = "Water Park" AND Locations.name = "Orlando, Florida"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?themeparks a :ThemeParks .
    ?locations a :Location .
    ?themeparks p:hasLocations ?locations .
    ?themeparks p:parkName ?parkname .
    ?themeparks p:familyEntertainment ?familyentertainment_f .
    ?locations p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?familyentertainment_f) = "Amusement Park")
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Orlando, Florida")
    BIND(?parkname AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?themeparks a :ThemeParks .
    ?locations a :Location .
    ?themeparks p:hasLocations ?locations .
    ?themeparks p:parkName ?parkname .
    ?themeparks p:familyEntertainment ?familyentertainment_f .
    ?locations p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?familyentertainment_f) = "Water Park")
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Orlando, Florida")
    BIND(?parkname AS ?o0)
  }
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What are the amusement parks and water parks in Orlando, Florida?
